title: rubus orgyalis
intro: Rubus orgyalis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a type of edible fruit-bearing shrub native to the Himalayan Mountains. The medicinal properties of Rubus orgyalis include its high antioxidant content and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of consuming Rubus orgyalis include reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer, as well as supporting digestive health and immune function. Rubus orgyalis can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including tea, jam, and dried fruit, which can be consumed fresh or used in traditional medicine.
